prompt: A photorealistic street style paparazzi shot of a young woman walking through a sunny parking lot. She has blonde hair in a high ponytail and is wearing black rectangular sunglasses. Her outfit consists of a matching grey long-sleeve crop top and high-waisted leggings, paired with chunky white sneakers and white crew socks. Over her left arm, she carries a light blue denim jacket, while holding a beige insulated water bottle and a smartphone in the same hand. The background is blurred with a shallow depth of field, showing the rear of a dark car on the left and out-of-focus buildings and trees in the distance, capturing a casual, candid athleisure aesthetic in bright daylight.
